data.title: CoinW Partners with Luka Modrić as Global Brand Ambassador
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 9, 2026, CoinW, a leading global cryptocurrency trading platform, revealed a significant collaboration with Luka Modrić, the revered Croatian footballer and Ballon d'Or recipient. Modrić, renowned as one of football's premier figures, will serve as the platform's new Global Brand Ambassador.

data.title: SentiAvatar, the First Interactive 3D Digital Human Framework from SentiPulse and GSAI, Now Open Source
data.description: A recent announcement from SentiPulse, an AI company based in JINAN, China, on April 9, 2026, has introduced a comprehensive release featuring a motion dataset, foundation model, and streaming architecture. This release is tailored to harmonize speech, gesture, and expression within real-time conversations. SentiPulse is renowned for its specialization in emotional foundation models and enhancing user experiences.

data.title: SHIB price prediction: Expect consolidation phase with neutral RSI at 47.95 and bearish MACD, signaling limited price movement in compressed ranges.
data.description: The Shiba Inu coin currently has a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 47.95 and a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Based on technical analysis, it indicates a period of sideways consolidation with restricted price movement within narrow ranges.

data.title: Certes Extends Breakthrough PQC Protection Delivering Quantum-Safe Data Security Across Any App, Any Infrastructure, Anywhere
data.description: Certes has launched v7 of its Data Protection and Risk Mitigation (DPRM) solution, providing sovereign and crypto-agile protection from servers to edges within hybrid and multi-cloud setups. The update aims to enhance security across various environments. The launch took place on April 9, 2026, in Pittsburgh. Certes is known for its expertise in data-centric security and Post-Quantum Cryptography, making it a prominent player in the field.
